---
title: Dynamic reporting with Quarto 
subtitle: Workshop at UNIGE 
sidebar: false
date: last-modified
author: 
  - name: 'Gorka Fraga Gonzalez'
    orcid: 0000-0002-1857-8607
    #affiliations:
      #- name: Center for Reproducible Science, University of Zurich

  - name: 'Fabio Molo'
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854
#    affiliations:
      #- name: Center for Reproducible Science, University of Zurich

#about:
  #template: broadside
  #image: "assets/narrow_alps.png"
  #image-title: ALPS
  #image-shape: rectangle
  #links:
    #- text: CRS
     # href: "https://www.crs.uzh.ch/en.html"
  #  - icon:  git
  #    aria-label: Gitlab
  #    href: "https://gitlab.uzh.ch/crsuzh/Workshop_Quarto_2024_UNIGE"
#    - icon: linkedin
#      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
 #     href: "https://www.linkedin.com/company/center-for-reproducible-science"  
listing:
  #categories: true
  type: grid
  
  id: main-listing
  fields: [title]
  #image-height: 210px
  grid-columns: 4
  #grid-item-align: center
  #sort-ui: true
  #filter-ui: true
  sort: false  
  contents: 
    - contents/instructions/*.qmd
    - contents/slides_intro/*.qmd
    - contents/demo/*.qmd
    - contents/slides_outro/*.qmd
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

Welcome to the workshop on Dynamic reporting with Quarto


 
::: {#main-listing}
:::
